case_title: CEBALLOS, BRENDA C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA VS SANCHEZ, ZEIDA LUPITA.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CEBALLOS, BRENDA C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ZEIDA LUPITA. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CEBALLOS, BRENDA C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ZEIDA LUPITA. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $601.11 AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ZEIDA LUPITA.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ZEIDA LUPITA.
